data.description: Piper Sandler Lowers Bank OZK Target $2 to $62

data.title: Fresh Bitcoin whales surpass veteran holders in $6B supply battle, impacting price volatility.
data.description: Recent data shows that newly acquired Bitcoin whales now possess a higher total value compared to long-term holders. This has led to a $6 billion excess supply in the market, potentially causing instability in prices.
Rutte ‘Did Not Discuss Sovereignty’ in Talks With Trump on Greenland — NATO

data.title: Columbia prof skeptical of NYSE's plan for blockchain 24/7 trading, instant settlement, and custody features.
data.description: On Monday, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) revealed a new initiative to implement blockchain technology for round-the-clock trading and immediate settlement of stocks and ETFs. This plan will also incorporate custody services.

data.title: Senator Boozman confirms no agreement with Dems on crypto bill. Republican draft includes protections for crypto developers. Senate Agriculture Committee plans to markup next week.
data.description: A draft of the market structure bill was released by the US Senate Agriculture Committee, led by Republicans. This draft includes safeguards for crypto developers and is scheduled for markup next week.

data.title: Q4 hinted at a bear market bottom per Bitwise. Despite strong fundamentals, crypto struggled, reminiscent of early 2023 rebound from 2022 lows.
data.description: Matt Hougan from Bitwise stated that despite strong fundamentals, the crypto markets showed poor performance in the fourth quarter. He likened this situation to early 2023, when the crypto market bounced back from lows experienced in 2022.

data.title: Global consortium funded with $60M by Gates Foundation, Novo Nordisk Foundation, Wellcome to fast-track antibiotic discovery.
data.description: A total of $60 million has been invested by philanthropic partners to facilitate collaborative research aimed at expediting the development of new antibiotics. This initiative, which involves the Gates Foundation, Novo Nordisk Foundation, and Wellcome, seeks to address the pressing need for next-generation antibiotics. The investment will support research efforts in Seattle, Copenhagen, and London.

data.title: Lakithia Nicole Jones releases 'The Power of Partnering With God: Becoming Your Best Self' on Jan. 22, 2026 to address mental health and wellness from a faith-based perspective.
data.description: In 'The Power of Partnering With God: Becoming Your Best Self,' Lakithia Nicole Jones introduces a comprehensive approach to holistic transformation. This insightful guide comes at a crucial moment, amidst prevalent discussions on mental health, burnout, wellness, and purpose. Released on Jan. 22, 2026, from BURBANK, Calif., the book aims to empower individuals to reach their full potential through spiritual alignment. Jones offers practical strategies and insights for personal growth, reflecting the growing interest in self-improvement. This timely publication is set to resonate with a wide audience seeking guidance, with its message of partnering with a higher power to achieve self-actualization.

data.title: Claroty raises $150M in Series F funding for global expansion and CPS protection platform development.
data.description: Claroty, a leading CPS protection company, has disclosed a significant investment from Golub Growth, an affiliate of Golub Capital. The investment aims to support Claroty's global expansion efforts and the enhancement of its industry-centric CPS protection platform. The announcement was made on January 22, 2026, in New York. This strategic move signifies a major milestone for Claroty as it pushes forward in its mission to provide unparalleled protection for cyber-physical systems.

data.title: TUMI introduces new Alpha collection with ambassadors Lando Norris and Wei Daxun. Released on Jan 22, 2026.
data.description: Today, TUMI announced the upcoming release of the newest version of the Alpha line in New York on January 22, 2026. Global Brand Ambassador Lando Norris and Asia-Pacific Brand Ambassador Wei Daxun are set to introduce the latest evolution of TUMI Alpha. This unveiling marks an important step for the renowned travel, lifestyle, and accessories brand.
Special Committee Established to Investigate January 18 Tengiz Oilfield Incident — Kazakhstan Energy Ministry

data.title: U.S. News names 2026 Best Cars for the Money Awards across 20 categories in evolving auto market.
data.description: In response to the changing automotive landscape driven by electrification, the 2026 awards have broadened to encompass a total of 20 categories within the automotive sector. On January 22, 2026, U.S. News & World Report, renowned for its rankings and consumer guidance worldwide, revealed the recipients of the prestigious 2026 Best Cars for the Money awards. These awards are a testament to the dedication and innovation within the automotive industry as it adapts to meet the demands of the evolving market.

data.title: China emerges victorious as Trump relinquishes global economic leadership in speech at World Economic Forum, renouncing liberal democratic order.
data.description: During a recent address at the World Economic Forum in Switzerland, the president declared a rejection of the remaining aspects of the liberal democratic system.
Stocks in Asia Advance, Following U.S. Gains on Trump’s Greenland Backdown

data.title: Envision Energy connects 1st AI wind turbine prototype for Fortescue in Australia, advancing renewable energy.
data.description: Envision Energy, a renowned company in green technology, has achieved a significant milestone by successfully connecting the initial AI wind turbine prototype to the grid in Australia on January 21, 2026. This development supports Fortescue's Nullagine Wind Project located in the Pilbara region. This marks Envision Energy's first operational project in the country and is a crucial step in advancing sustainable energy solutions.
J&J Price Target Lifted to $250 by TD Cowen, Up from $222

data.title: Saudi Arabia is leading global efforts to protect coral reefs, and unlock the potential of Artificial Intelligence at the World Economic Forum.
data.description: In Davos, Switzerland, during the World Economic Forum, Saudi Arabia announced its leadership in a worldwide initiative to safeguard coral reefs and harness the potential of artificial intelligence. This new global effort aims to protect marine ecosystems and leverage AI technologies for environmental conservation.

data.title: DFRobot showcases AI & robotics educational solutions at Bett 2026, Stand SM23 in London, focusing on interactive learning.
data.description: In Shanghai on January 21, 2026, DFRobot, a leading provider of Al-Powered STEM Education solutions, showcased a variety of interactive AI and robotics learning products at Stand SM23 during the BETT 2026 event in London's ExCeL Centre. The exhibit highlighted the integration of Artificial Intelligence into educational tools.
